audit_result.proof_trace: Node subscribes only to custody group subnets (~8-16 of 128 total) via nimbus_beacon_node.nim:1350-1352, but when proposing broadcasts ALL 128 data columns to their respective subnets. This violates gossipsub protocol requirement to subscribe before publishing.
audit_result.attack_scenario: Proposer nodes attempt to publish to unsubscribed topics causing libp2p errors, failed message delivery, or peer reputation degradation. Not externally exploitable but causes operational failures.

PROP-6a4369e9-inv-036.text: Publishing data columns must only occur on subnets the node is subscribed to (custody/sampling).
PROP-6a4369e9-inv-036.assertion: forall col: published(col, subnet) => subscribed(subnet, custody) || subscribed(subnet, sampling)
